SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.storage

Interface StorageProcessor

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStorageProcessor, AVStorageProcessor, DovecotStorageProcessor, LocalStorageProcessor, RocksDbStorageProcessor, SpamStorageProcessor, StalwartStorageProcessor
public interface StorageProcessor
Storage processor interface.

Used to process emails after receiving the message.

Processors can check for chaos headers to force specific return values for testing purposes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Optional<Boolean>
    getForcedReturnValue(EmailParser emailParser)
    Checks for chaos headers that force a specific return value for this processor.
    boolean
    process(Connection connection, EmailParser emailParser)
    Processes storage for the given session.

  • Method Details

    • process

      boolean process(Connection connection, EmailParser emailParser) throws IOException
      Processes storage for the given session.
      Parameters:
      connection - Connection instance.
      emailParser - EmailParser instance.
      Returns:
      Boolean.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.

    • getForcedReturnValue

      default Optional<Boolean> getForcedReturnValue(EmailParser emailParser)
      Checks for chaos headers that force a specific return value for this processor.

      This method should be called at the start of the processor's process() method. If a forced return value is present, the processor should return it immediately without performing normal processing.

      The chaos header format is: 

      X-Robin-Chaos: LocalStorageClient; processor=ProcessorClassName; return=true/false
      Parameters:
      emailParser - EmailParser instance containing the email with potential chaos headers.
      Returns:
      Optional containing the forced return value if chaos header is found, or empty otherwise.
